title: Intermittent "failed to route" errors
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

I am getting failed to route error when building my project
I have created a test repo with all setup

1. Clone https://github.com/EvgenyMuryshkin/qusoc.git
2. Checkout branch **failed-to-route**
3. Open qusoc/tinyfpga in Atom with APIO (installed a week ago)
4. Run build

Build failed with "failed to route" error.

Changing line 22 in source file **top.v** from
```
  assign LED = counter[17];
```

to
```
  assign LED = counter[18];
```

fixes build.

## Expected behavior

Expect to build binaries

## Actual behavior

Route keeps failing for some configurations. Also happens when pulling out debug signals from the design etc.
